title: onosma kotschyi
intro: Onosma kotschyi, also known as golden yellow toadflax or yellow toadflax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Onosma kotschyi include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Onosma kotschyi is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
